meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Effects SDK
products.tagline: AI video & audio effects SDK for real-time apps
products.summaryZh: AI视频与音频效果SDK，适用于实时应用
products.descriptionZh: Effects SDK 帮助开发者为网页、桌面及移动应用添加具备生产级质量的AI视频与音频特效。支持背景虚化、虚拟背景、智能构图、光线校正、美颜、叠加效果、虚拟形象及实时降噪——所有功能均在客户端本地运行，无需将视频或音频数据传输至我们的服务器。
products.description: Effects SDK helps developers add production-ready AI video and audio effects to web, desktop, and mobile apps. Add background blur, virtual backgrounds, smart framing, lighting correction, beautification, overlays, avatars, and real-time noise suppression — all running client-side, without sending video or audio to our servers.

products.name: ChatGPT Work
products.tagline: Partner for your most ambitious work
products.summaryZh: 助你完成最具雄心的作品
products.descriptionZh: ChatGPT Work 是一个能够跨应用和文件执行操作的智能体，可在需要时持续处理项目数小时，并将目标转化为完成的工作成果。
products.description: ChatGPT Work is an agent that can take action across your apps and files, stay with a project for hours if needed, and turn a goal into finished work.

products.name: Kickbacks CLI
products.tagline: The terminal and Mac menu bar companion for Kickbacks.ai
products.summaryZh: Kickbacks.ai 的终端与 Mac 菜单栏伴侣
products.descriptionZh: 在终端和Mac菜单栏中查看你的Kickbacks.ai状态、实时收益及广告历史记录。
products.description: See your Kickbacks.ai status, live earnings, and ad history in the terminal and Mac menu bar.

products.name: SoundPipe
products.tagline: SoundPipe is a mixing board for your Mac
products.summaryZh: SoundPipe 是一款适用于 Mac 的调音台。
products.descriptionZh: SoundPipe 可在你的 Mac 上创建虚拟音频设备，让你能将来自任意应用或麦克风的音频发送至其他应用。
products.description: SoundPipe creates virtual audio devices on your Mac so you can send audio from any app, or your microphone, to any other app.

products.name: Basedash SCIM
products.tagline: Your org changes. Access keeps up.
products.summaryZh: 组织在变，访问权限始终同步。
products.descriptionZh: Basedash SCIM 将工作区身份与公司已管理的目录保持同步。当人员入职、调岗或离职时，用户、群组和组织成员身份将自动更新——减少逐个应用的清理工作，并帮助管理者掌握谁仍拥有访问权限。结合 SSO、RBAC 和 RLS，它让企业团队在推广 Basedash 时更有信心，而不会使身份管理成为瓶颈。组织在变，访问权限随之同步。
products.description: Basedash SCIM keeps workspace identity aligned with the directory your company already manages. As people join, change teams, or leave, users, groups, and organization memberships stay current—reducing app-by-app cleanup and helping leaders answer who still has access. Together with SSO, RBAC, and RLS, it gives enterprise teams more confidence to roll Basedash out without turning identity administration into a bottleneck. Your org changes. Access keeps up.

products.name: Investor Updates
products.tagline: Keep all your investors in the loop with bulk updates
products.summaryZh: 使用批量更新，让所有投资者随时了解最新动态。
products.descriptionZh: 最简便的方式，让天使投资人和风险投资家了解你创业公司的进展。每月或每季度向投资者发送关于公司牵引力、增长、人员招聘、失败经历和里程碑的更新，有助于建立信任与透明度。
products.description: The easiest way to keep angels and venture capitalists informed about the progress of your startup. Sending investor updates monthly or quarterly about your traction, growth, hires, failures and milestones helps build trust and transparency.

products.name: MeMex
products.tagline: A private, searchable memory for your Mac
products.summaryZh: Mac 专属的私密可搜索记忆库
products.descriptionZh: MeMex 为你的 Mac 赋予私密视觉记忆。它将屏幕活动转化为真实工作时刻的有序时间线，让你能用自然语言提问并回溯匹配的屏幕证据。日/周报告自动总结已完成工作，模式洞察功能则能识别值得自动化的重复工作流。录屏内容存储在你指定的本地位置；AI 分析为可选功能，支持使用你自己的服务商或兼容的本地端点。
products.description: MeMex gives your Mac a private visual memory. It turns screen activity into an organized timeline of real work moments, then lets you ask plain-English questions and return to matching screen evidence. Daily and weekly reports summarize work you already did, while Pattern Insights spots repeated workflows worth automating. Recordings stay local in a location you control; AI analysis is optional and uses your own provider or compatible local endpoint.

products.name: Plexa
products.tagline: Website trust, security and SEO in one platform
products.summaryZh: 网站信任、安全与SEO一体化平台
products.descriptionZh: Plexa 通过在一个平台上识别信任、安全、SEO 和合规性问题，帮助企业构建更优质的网站。Plexa 不会用技术术语让你感到困扰，而是提供清晰、可执行的建议，帮助你理解问题所在、为何重要以及如何修复。
products.description: Plexa helps businesses build better websites by identifying trust, security, SEO and compliance issues in one place. Instead of overwhelming you with technical jargon, Plexa provides clear, actionable recommendations to help you understand what's wrong, why it matters and how to fix it.

products.name: Market Genie 2.0 AI Marketing System
products.tagline: We built something you've been wishing for.. Wish granted
products.summaryZh: 我们实现了你一直以来的愿望……愿望成真。
products.descriptionZh: 我们从头重建了Market Genie。全新Market Genie 2.0：AI邮件撰写、线索抓取、可视化自动化、CRM、漏斗构建、预约排程、数据分析——客户获取所需的一切，尽在一个平台。创始人专属50个名额：完全免费使用一年（含白标）。名额有限，立即认领。
products.description: We rebuilt Market Genie from the ground up. Meet Market Genie 2.0: AI email writer, lead scraper, visual automation, CRM, funnel builder, appointment scheduler, analytics, everything for client acquisition in one platform. Founders 50 exclusive: 1 year completely FREE (white-label included). Limited spots. Claim yours today

products.name: Ortu
products.tagline: The clipboard manager for people who copy-paste for a living
products.summaryZh: 面向以复制粘贴为生的人设计的剪贴板管理器
products.descriptionZh: Ortu 会记住你复制的一切——文本、图片、文件——让你可以在任何应用中即时再次粘贴。支持全文搜索、粘贴堆栈、加密隐藏、智能自动分组。100%本地运行，无需账户，开源。支持 macOS、Windows 和 Linux。
products.description: Ortu remembers everything you copy — text, images, files — so you can paste it again instantly, from any app. Full-text search, paste stack, secret masking with encryption, smart auto-grouping. 100% local, no account, open source. macOS, Windows & Linux.

products.name: YouTube Comments Exporter
products.tagline: Export and analyze YouTube comments in seconds.
products.summaryZh: 数秒内导出并分析YouTube评论。
products.descriptionZh: 每条YouTube评论都蕴含着宝贵的反馈、客户问题、功能请求、产品创意和市场洞察——但手动收集整理这些信息需要耗费数小时。Veerexa开发的YouTube评论导出工具，能让你在数秒内提取任意公开YouTube视频的评论，并以多种格式导出以便轻松分析。无需编写任何代码，即可快速了解受众的真实想法。
products.description: very YouTube comment is a source of valuable feedback, customer questions, feature requests, product ideas, and market research—but collecting and organizing them manually takes hours. YouTube Comments Exporter by Veerexa helps you extract comments from any public YouTube video in seconds and export them in multiple formats for easy analysis. You can quickly discover what your audience is thinking without writing a single line of code.

products.name: Clearcan
products.tagline: Free document scanner. No ads, no subscriptions, no cloud.
products.summaryZh: 免费文档扫描。无广告，无订阅，无云存储。
products.descriptionZh: Clearcan 是一款文档扫描应用，其核心理念很简单：扫描只需几秒，而非订阅。支持自动边缘检测扫描、按内容搜索文档（设备端文本识别支持英语、俄语、罗马尼亚语）、从任意页面复制文本，并导出无水印、无限制的清晰PDF。所有操作均在iPhone上完成。无广告、无账户、无分析、无云端。由一位厌倦了付费墙泛滥的扫描应用的独立开发者打造。
products.description: Clearcan is a document scanner built on a simple idea: scanning should take seconds, not a subscription. Scan with automatic edge detection, search documents by their content (on-device text recognition in English, Russian, Romanian), copy text from any page, and export clean PDFs — no watermarks, no limits. Everything runs on your iPhone. No ads, no accounts, no analytics, no cloud. Built by an indie developer tired of scanner apps stuffed with paywalls.

products.name: agentfdr
products.tagline: See why your coding agent looped, drifted, or burned tokens
products.summaryZh: 了解您的编码代理为何循环、偏离或消耗代币。
products.descriptionZh: agentfdr 读取 Claude Code 已生成的转录，将其转化为飞行记录：逐轮时间线、自动异常标记（循环、错误连续、Token 消耗）、实时观察模式、计划使用追踪及成本估算。零侵入、完全本地化、MIT 许可。
products.description: agentfdr reads the transcripts Claude Code already writes and turns them into a flight recording: per-turn timeline, automatic anomaly flags (loops, error streaks, token burns), live watch mode, plan-usage tracking, and cost estimates. Zero instrumentation, 100% local, MIT.

products.name: CopyWrite Visibility Assessment Score
products.tagline: Turning enquiries into sales with visibility infrastructure
products.summaryZh: 用可见性基础设施将询盘转化为销售
products.descriptionZh: 几分钟内衡量您的业务可见度。CopyWrite 可见度评估对您的网站、SEO、Google 商家资料、评价、内容、社交媒体存在感、AI 可发现性及客户流量进行评分。获取个性化可见度评分及实用建议，助您的业务更易被找到、信任和选择。通过 API 密钥按简单步骤操作，即可获得竞争对手对比结果。免费开始：https://copywrite.biz/score 了解更多：https://copywrite.biz
products.description: Measure your business visibility in minutes. The CopyWrite Visibility Assessment scores your website, SEO, Google Business Profile, reviews, content, social presence, AI discoverability, and customer flow. Get a personalised Visibility Score with practical recommendations to help your business become easier to find, trust, and choose. Follow simple steps with your API key, you can get competitor comparison results Start free: https://copywrite.biz/score Learn more: https://copywrite.biz

products.name: GraphPaper
products.tagline: browser based graphpaper canvas for delightful sketching
products.summaryZh: 基于浏览器的方格纸画布，用于愉悦的草图绘制
products.descriptionZh: GraphPaper 是一款基于浏览器的免费方格纸画布，可用于绘制图表、几何图形和笔记，支持网格吸附、形状、曲线、箭头和填充功能。同时也是一个功能尚可的SVG编辑器：可导入、编辑和导出SVG。无需注册。
products.description: GraphPaper is a free browser based graphpaper canvas for sketching diagrams, geometry, and notes, with grid snapping, shapes, curves, arrows, and fills. Also a half-decent SVG editor: import, edit, and export SVG. No sign-up.

products.name: Cloudflare Drop
products.tagline: Drop your folder in browser & deploy instantly on Cloudflare
products.summaryZh: 将文件夹拖入浏览器，即可在Cloudflare上即时部署。
products.descriptionZh: 拖拽文件夹或压缩包，即可在数秒内将站点部署至Cloudflare全球网络。无需注册账户，部署有效期为60分钟，超时后自动失效，认领后可保留。
products.description: Drop a folder or zip. See your site live on Cloudflare's global network in seconds. No account needed. Deployment is active for 60 minutes, then expires unless you claim it.

products.name: San Fran Sim
products.tagline: A startup tycoon game
products.summaryZh: 一款创业大亨游戏
products.descriptionZh: 从车库创业到IPO，经营一家软件初创公司。发布功能、修复漏洞、组建团队（再加一条狗）、挺过烧钱速度，学习真实SaaS指标，包括MRR、流失率、LTV、CAC，同时一位冷面解说员会旁白你的每一个失误。免费，浏览器内运行，无需注册。
products.description: Run a software startup from a garage to an IPO. Ship features, squash bugs, hire a team (and a dog), survive the burn rate, and learn real SaaS metrics inc. MRR, churn, LTV, CAC, while a dry announcer narrates your every mistake. Free, in your browser, no signup required.

products.name: Breathing In Labour
products.tagline: A distraction-free breathing app for labor preparation
products.summaryZh: 一款无干扰的呼吸练习应用，用于分娩准备
products.descriptionZh: Breathing In Labour 是一款教育型、无干扰的分娩准备应用，区别于那些内容杂乱、广告繁多的同类产品。其特色在于：1. 内置经验证的呼吸技巧知识，覆盖分娩各阶段；2. 极简界面搭配舒缓视觉反馈，帮助掌握呼吸节奏；3. 零广告，无需强制注册即可使用；4. 核心功能完全免费。
products.description: Breathing In Labour is an educational, distraction-free alternative to cluttered and ad-heavy labor prep apps. It stands out by offering: 1. Built-in knowledge of proven breathing techniques for all stages of labor. 2. A hyper-minimalist interface with calming visual feedback to master breathing rhythms. 3. Zero ads or forced accounts to get in the way of your practice. 4. Core mechanics are 100% free to use.

products.name: Trailsense
products.tagline: See where people are hiking, without cameras
products.summaryZh: 查看人们徒步的地点，无需摄像头
products.descriptionZh: 步道有时拥挤，有时空旷，但如何知晓？我们打造Trailsense来解答这个问题。太阳能节点通过匿名Wi-Fi探测请求（手机在扫描已知网络时发出的信号）统计徒步人数。仪表盘将这些数据转化为每条步道随时间变化的清晰繁忙程度视图。无需摄像头，无需徒步者安装应用，个人数据也绝不会离开设备。
products.description: Trails can get busy, and others stay empty, but how do you know? We built Trailsense to answer that. Our solar-powered nodes count hikers using anonymized wifi probe requests, the pings a phone sends while scanning for known networks. A dashboard turns those counts into a clear view of how busy each trail is over time. No cameras, no app for hikers to install, and no personal data ever leaving the device.

products.name: SnapPeach
products.tagline: See any outfit on you before you buy - in ~10 seconds
products.summaryZh: 购买前预览上身效果——约10秒即可完成
products.descriptionZh: SnapPeach 是一款 Chrome 扩展程序，可在约 10 秒内让你在任何购物网站上看到自己穿着任意服装的效果。
products.description: SnapPeach is a Chrome extension that shows you wearing any garment on any shopping site, in about 10 seconds.
